summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trading Dashboard. Authentication and UI work perfectly, but core trading functionality is blocked by Alpha Vantage API integration issue.

critical_bugs.issue: Alpha Vantage API returns demo message instead of stock data
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all stock data functionality - charts, trading, backtesting
critical_bugs.root_cause: Demo API key limitation - returns 'The demo API key is for demo purposes only' message

critical_bugs.issue: No stock data available for indicator calculations
critical_bugs.impact: Charts show 'No data available', indicators cannot be calculated

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot create trades without stock price data
Backtesting fails due to lack of historical data

integration_issues.issue: Charts show 'No data available', 'No CCI data', 'No MACD data'
BUY/SHORT buttons return 'No data available' error
Current price shows '-' instead of actual stock prices

passed_tests: User login system with JWT authentication
Beautiful, professional UI design and layout
EMA sliders are interactive with proper color coding
Navigation between pages (Dashboard, Backtester, Paper Trades, Settings)
Symbols API returns 15 stock symbols correctly
Responsive design and proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.backend: 66.7% (10/15 tests passed - auth and settings work, stock data fails)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI/UX excellent, core trading blocked by backend data issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Replace Alpha Vantage 'demo' API key with a valid API key. The demo key only returns a message about getting a real key, blocking all stock data functionality. Without real stock data, the trading dashboard cannot function as intended. All core features (charts, trading, backtesting) depend on this integration.
